import io
import string

fn rot13_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    let v = b - 65
    let r = v + 13
    let m = r % 26
    m + 65
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    let v = b - 97
    let r = v + 13
    let m = r % 26
    m + 97
  else
    b
  end
end

fn rot13(_ s: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut result = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      let rb = rot13_byte(b)
      result = result + string.from_byte(rb)
    when None
      result = result
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  println(rot13(line))
when None
  println("")
end
